subcodes.first_line: Thy name hath been mentioned before His countenance, wherefore these sublime and wondrous words have shone forth from the horizon of the favors of the Lord of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمت لدی الوجه مذکور لذا این کلمات منیعه بدیعه از افق الطاف مالک بریه لائح و
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
